auditor: Fort Group Chartered Professional Accountants Inc.
one_time_description: Gain on sale of tangible capital assets
economic_notes: Tim Hortons franchise operations via 2361701 Ontario Inc. and Waaninaawagaang Developments LP; forestry operations via Obishikokaang Resources Corporation; Lac Seul Generating Station Limited Partnership (.01% interest); Lac Seul Domco Catering and Housekeeping Joint Venture; Flood Claim Settlement trust fund established from Government of Canada compensation
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED due to deferral of program surpluses for fixed-contribution and own-source funded programs totaling $13,013,506 — not in accordance with Canadian public sector accounting standards. Had revenue not been deferred, accumulated surplus would be $13,013,506 higher. Complex consolidation includes 14+ entities. Housing expenses split between Ke-nawind Housing Development Authority ($656,484) and Lac Seul CMHC Housing Authority ($1,516,758). expenses_housing is sum of both. expenses_enterprises includes Obishikokaang Resources Corp, 2361701 Ontario Inc, Waaninaawagaang Developments LP. Prior year comparative figures used from 2020 actual column.
